ddls:
CREATE TABLE "testing_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each testing result */,
  "dbms" INTEGER /* Reference to the DBMS used */,
  "casestudy" INTEGER /* Reference to the case study */,
  "criterion" INTEGER /* Reference to the criterion used */,
  "datagenerator" INTEGER /* Reference to the data generator used */,
  "randomseed" INTEGER /* Random seed used for data generation */,
  "testsuitefile" TEXT /* File path to the test suite */,
  "coverage" REAL /* Percentage of code coverage achieved */,
  "evaluations" INTEGER /* Number of evaluations performed */,
  "tests" INTEGER /* Number of tests in the test suite */,
  "mutationpipeline" INTEGER /* Reference to the mutation pipeline used */,
  "scorenumerator" INTEGER /* Numerator for the scoring system */,
  "scoredenominator" INTEGER /* Denominator for the scoring system */,
  "technique" TEXT /* Technique used for mutation analysis */,
  "transactions" INTEGER /* Indicates if transactions are used in the test suite */,
  "testgenerationtime" INTEGER /* Time taken for test generation */,
  "mutantgenerationtime" INTEGER /* Time taken for mutant generation */,
  "originalresultstime" INTEGER /* Time taken for running original tests */,
  "mutationanalysistime" INTEGER /* Time taken for mutation analysis */,
  "timetaken" INTEGER /* Total time taken for the entire process */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Information about the test environment */,
  "test_environment_version" TEXT /* Version of the test environment */,
  "test_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the test scenario */,
  "test_parameters" TEXT /* Additional parameters used during testing */,
  "test_duration" INTEGER /* Total duration of the test in milliseconds */,
  "test_status" TEXT /* Status of the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_testing_results_datagenerator FOREIGN KEY ("datagenerator") REFERENCES data_generators ("generator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_testing_results_casestudy FOREIGN KEY ("casestudy") REFERENCES case_studies ("casestudy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_testing_results_dbms FOREIGN KEY ("dbms") REFERENCES dbms_details ("dbms_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_testing_results_mutationpipeline FOREIGN KEY ("mutationpipeline") REFERENCES mutation_pipelines ("pipeline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_testing_results_criterion FOREIGN KEY ("criterion") REFERENCES criteria ("criterion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dbms_details" (
  "dbms_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each DBMS */,
  "dbms_name" TEXT /* Name of the database management system */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the DBMS */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the DBMS */,
  "installation_path" TEXT /* Path where the DBMS is installed */,
  "license_type" TEXT /* Type of license */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date and time of the DBMS */,
  "supported_features" TEXT /* JSON object listing supported features */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dbms_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_studies" (
  "casestudy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case study */,
  "casestudy_name" TEXT /* Name of the case study */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the case study */,
  "domain" TEXT /* Domain of the case study */,
  "complexity" TEXT /* Complexity level of the case study */,
  "estimated_time" INTEGER /* Estimated time required to complete the case study in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("casestudy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "criteria" (
  "criterion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each criterion */,
  "criterion_name" TEXT /* Name of the criterion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the criterion */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight assigned to the criterion for scoring purposes */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the criterion */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the criterion was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the criterion was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("criterion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_generators" (
  "generator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data generator */,
  "generator_name" TEXT /* Name of the data generator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data generator */,
  "data_type_supported" TEXT /* JSON object listing data types supported by the generator */,
  "max_data_size" INTEGER /* Maximum size of data that can be generated */,
  "last_used" TEXT /* Last date and time the generator was used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("generator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mutation_pipelines" (
  "pipeline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mutation pipeline */,
  "pipeline_name" TEXT /* Name of the mutation pipeline */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the mutation pipeline */,
  "steps" TEXT /* JSON array of steps involved in the mutation pipeline */,
  "dependencies" TEXT /* JSON array of dependencies required for the pipeline */,
  "last_run" TEXT /* Last date and time the pipeline was run */,
  "success_rate" REAL /* Success rate of the pipeline in previous runs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pipeline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "testing_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each testing session */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the testing result */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the testing session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the testing session */,
  "session_name" TEXT /* Name of the testing session */,
  "session_description" TEXT /* Description of the testing session */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of testing session */,
  "session_environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the session was conducted */,
  "session_status" TEXT /* Status of the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_testing_sessions_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES testing_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coverage_details" (
  "coverage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coverage detail */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the testing result */,
  "coverage_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of code coverage */,
  "covered_lines" INTEGER /* Number of lines covered */,
  "total_lines" INTEGER /* Total number of lines */,
  "coverage_type" TEXT /* Type of coverage */,
  "coverage_source" TEXT /* Source of the coverage data */,
  "coverage_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the coverage report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coverage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coverage_details_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES testing_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the testing result */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric */,
  "metric_source" TEXT /* Source of the metric data */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "metric_status" TEXT /* Status of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_metrics_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES testing_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_cases" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test case */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the testing result */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the test case */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the test case */,
  "test_case_type" TEXT /* Type of test case */,
  "test_case_source" TEXT /* Source of the test case */,
  "test_case_description" TEXT /* Description of the test case */,
  "test_case_status" TEXT /* Status of the test case */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES testing_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mutations" (
  "mutation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mutation */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the testing result */,
  "mutation_name" TEXT /* Name of the mutation */,
  "detected" INTEGER /* Indicates if the mutation was detected */,
  "mutation_type" TEXT /* Type of mutation */,
  "mutation_source" TEXT /* Source of the mutation */,
  "mutation_description" TEXT /* Description of the mutation */,
  "mutation_status" TEXT /* Status of the mutation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mutation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mutations_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES testing_results ("result_id")
)
